title: planks drops op loots
description: Wood drops OP loot. This datapack replaces standard plank drops with "God-tier" gear like enchanted Netherite and Golden Apples to bypass traditional progression.
body:
### 🪓 Turn Boring Wood into GOD-TIER Gear!
**Hi everyone!! Error6119 here.** Welcome to the easiest (and most chaotic) way to become completely overpowered in survival. Why spend hours mining for diamonds when you can just punch your floorboards?

![Uu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da15888d8561f570e310effce7efd7e4fc82aeb0.png)

**In this datapack:**
It’s incredibly simple: Break *any* wooden plank block in the game, and watch the legendary loot rain down. Whether you are tearing down an Oak village or a Crimson forest base, every single plank acts like a custom treasure chest.

![Uj](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acd2301308c23611e232ea19e8eba37d8edac88e.png)

**What kind of OP Loot are we talking about?**
I've purposely blurred out the best drops in the preview images. The drop tables are packed with absolute insanity! Will you get:
 * Max-enchanted Netherite gear?
 * Stacks of Enchanted Golden Apples?
 * Custom items that completely break the game?
 * ...or something even crazier?

![Hh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030f05bb854ae9ec3aa6ca0d6bb90617da8f6218.png)

You will have to download it and break a plank to find out! 😉
**Data Pack Specs:**
 * **Versions:** YES, it flawlessly works from **1.16.x through 1.20.x**.
 * **Plank Types:** Works on *all* vanilla plank variations.
 * **Multiplayer Ready:** Perfect for starting a chaotic SMP with your friends or trying a custom speedrun challenge!
**Ready to break the game?**

--------MADE BY Error6119-------
